case_title: KWAN, MARIA CHUI WAN vs. TAM, KAN CHI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, MARIA CHUI WAN AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, KAN CHI DOES 1 TO 20 STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-09-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-08-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-19-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-09-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-09-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF JAMES P. BRADLEY FILED.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-03-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-03-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-01-1994 CONTINUED FROM AUG-03-1994 TO SEP-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
